description:
Cloth has introduced 28 new enterprise security integrations, including major platforms like CrowdStrike and Palo Alto, all powered by the new Compliance API. This API integration allows security teams programmatic access to Cloth Enterprise chats, files, and projects, enabling existing data loss prevention rules and monitoring playbooks to be applied. It offers robust data security without requiring new tooling or AI-specific governance layers, making it a powerful addition for businesses leveraging ai agents.

----
🚀 DYNAMOUS AI COMMUNITY

Want to learn agentic coding with live daily events and workshops?
Check out Dynamous AI: https://dynamous.ai/?code=646a60
Get 10% off here 👉 https://shorturl.smartcode.diy/dynamous_ai_10_percent_discount

⚡ HOSTINGER — RELIABLE HOSTING FOR YOUR PROJECTS (10% OFF)

Whether you're shipping a portfolio, a side project, n8n flows, or AI agents — I use Hostinger for fast, affordable VPS + web hosting.

Get 10% off here 👉 https://hostinger.com/DIYSMARTCODE

(Affiliate link — costs you nothing, supports the channel.)
----

What you will see in this 1:38 breakdown:
→ 28 enterprise security integrations Claude shipped on day one — every major SOC vendor
→ Claude Compliance API: programmatic access to chats, uploaded files, projects
→ Activity events feed across Claude Enterprise AND the Claude Platform (logins, admin, config)
→ 9 SOC layers covered: DLP, SASE, SIEM, Identity, eDiscovery, AI security posture, AI observability
→ How to enable the API (Org Settings → Data and Privacy) and the two key types
→ Endpoint: api.anthropic.com/v1/compliance — 600 req/min rate limit

Claude Compliance API announcement: https://claude.com/blog/compliance-api-security-partners
Compliance API developer docs: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/manage-claude/compliance-api
How to access the Compliance API: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/13015708-access-the-compliance-api
Claude Enterprise: https://claude.com/enterprise
Claude Platform: https://claude.com/platform

So — is 28 enterprise security integrations enough to put Claude in your stack? Or do you still need a separate AI governance layer on top? Drop your pick below 👇

#claude #anthropic #aisecurity #compliance #enterpriseai #ciso #aigovernance #cybersecurity #soc #crowdstrike #paloalto #okta #zscaler #datadog #wiz #snyk #aiobservability #dlp #siem #saas #aiagents #llmsecurity #devsecops #aiintheworkplace #complianceapi
fulltitle: Don’t Deploy Anthropic Without This Compliance Check #CyberSec #AI #Shorts
